message:
test(btree): add MockBtreeCursor seek successor positioning tests

Add comprehensive tests for MockBtreeCursor seek behavior to verify the
successor positioning semantics implemented in the previous commit:

- test_mock_cursor_seek_positions_at_successor(): Tests table_move_to
  positions at successor rowid when target not found, and EOF when no
  successor exists
- test_mock_cursor_index_seek_positions_at_successor(): Same for
  index_move_to with key-based seeks

Also includes refactoring in repro_delete_skip.rs and minor vdbe lib
changes from ongoing development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
